hero.title: Chat with
hero.subtitle: Synapse matches you with people who share your interests. A developer meets a developer, a musician meets a musician. No chaos — only meaningful conversations.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to quality conversations
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick your area of interest — from programming to music. Add tags for precise matching.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our algorithm finds a partner with similar interests and expertise level.
howItWorks.step3Desc: HD video with encryption. Like your partner? Keep going. Not a match? Find the next one.

categoriesSection.title: Interest Categories
categoriesSection.subtitle: Chat with people from your field

features.title: Why
features.smartMatchingDesc: Not random — an algorithm. The system considers interests, tags, and experience.
features.securityDesc: AI moderation, phone verification, report system.
features.webrtcDesc: Video goes directly between you. Low latency, high quality.
features.pwaDesc: Install as an app on your phone. Works without the App Store.

guide.title: User Guide
guide.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Synapse
guide.step1: Create an account — enter your name, email, and password
guide.step2: Go to the lobby — this is the main screen where matching happens
guide.step3: Choose a category and subcategories that interest you
guide.step4: Click 'Find a Partner' — the system will find someone with similar interests
guide.cat1: There are 8 main categories: Tech, Business, Creative, Science, Sports, Education, Entertainment, Networking
guide.cat2: Click a category to expand subcategories — select as many as you want with checkmarks
guide.cat3: Your selections are saved automatically and persist between sessions
guide.chat1: When a partner is found, the video chat starts automatically
guide.chat2: You can report a user if they violate the rules
guide.chat3: Rate your conversation partner after the chat
guide.chat4: Your trust score improves with positive ratings
guide.safety1: Every user has a trust score based on their behavior
guide.safety2: Users with low trust are placed in separate pools
guide.safety3: You can report inappropriate behavior at any time
guide.sub1: Free plan: 15 chats per day, your region only
guide.sub2: Synapse+: unlimited chats, all regions, priority queue
guide.sub3: Synapse Pro: everything in Plus + group rooms, analytics

pricing.title: Subscriptions
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs
pricing.stripeNote: Secure payment via Stripe (LemonSqueezy). Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay.
pricing.usdtNote: Pay with USDT TRC-20 on the TRON network. Send the exact amount to the provided address.

legal.termsS1Text: By accessing or using Synapse ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
legal.termsS2Text: You must be at least 18 years of age to use Synapse. By creating an account, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years old. Users under 18 are strictly prohibited from using the Service.
legal.termsS3Text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.
legal.termsS4Text: When using Synapse, you agree NOT to:
legal.termsS4Li1: Share sexually explicit, violent, or illegal content
legal.termsS4Li2: Harass, threaten, or abuse other users
legal.termsS4Li4: Use the Service if you are under 18 years old
legal.termsS4Li5: Attempt to circumvent safety or moderation systems
legal.termsS4Li6: Distribute malware, spam, or phishing content
legal.termsS4Li7: Record or capture other users' video/audio without consent
legal.termsS4Li8: Use the Service for any illegal purpose
legal.termsS5Text: Synapse employs automated and manual moderation systems to enforce community guidelines. We reserve the right to warn, suspend, or permanently ban any user who violates these terms without prior notice.
legal.termsS6Text: Synapse uses a reputation system (Trust Score) that affects your matching experience. Users with consistently positive behavior are rewarded with better matching. Users with violations may be placed in restricted pools.
legal.termsS7Text: Paid features (Synapse+, boosts) are processed via USDT TRC-20 cryptocurrency. All payments are final and non-refundable unless required by applicable law. Subscriptions auto-expire at the end of the billing period.
legal.termsS8Text: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted service, security from all threats, or the behavior of other users.
legal.termsS9Text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Synapse shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service.
legal.termsS10Text: We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms. We will notify users of significant changes.
legal.termsS11Text: For questions about these Terms, contact us through the platform's support channels or admin panel.
legal.privacyS1Text: We collect the following information when you use Synapse:
legal.privacyS1Li1: Account data: name, email address, hashed password, selected region
legal.privacyS1Li2: Usage data: chat sessions, ratings, report history, Trust Score
legal.privacyS1Li3: Payment data: USDT transaction IDs, wallet addresses (we do not store private keys)
legal.privacyS1Li4: Technical data: IP address, browser type, device info (for WebRTC connections)
legal.privacyS2Li1: To provide and improve the Service
legal.privacyS2Li2: To match you with relevant partners based on interests and region
legal.privacyS2Li3: To calculate and maintain your Trust Score
legal.privacyS2Li4: To process payments and manage subscriptions
legal.privacyS2Li5: To enforce community guidelines and moderate content
legal.privacyS3Text: Synapse uses peer-to-peer WebRTC technology for video and audio calls. Video and audio streams are transmitted directly between users and are NOT recorded, stored, or monitored by our servers. Our servers only handle signaling (connection setup) — the actual media never passes through our infrastructure unless a TURN relay is required for connectivity.
legal.privacyS4Text: Your data is stored in encrypted PostgreSQL databases. Passwords are hashed using bcrypt with salt. All connections use TLS/SSL encryption. We implement rate limiting, JWT authentication, and other security measures to protect your data.
legal.privacyS5Text: We do NOT sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties, except:
legal.privacyS5Li1: When required by law or legal process
legal.privacyS5Li2: To protect the safety of users (e.g., reporting illegal activity to authorities)
legal.privacyS5Li3: With service providers essential to running the platform (hosting, CDN)
legal.privacyS6Text: We use essential cookies for authentication (session tokens) and localStorage for user preferences (language, theme). We do not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics.
legal.privacyS7Li3: Request deletion of your account and associated data
legal.privacyS7Li4: Export your data in a portable format
legal.privacyS7Li5: Object to processing of your data
legal.privacyS7Outro: To exercise these rights, contact us through the admin panel or support channels.
legal.privacyS8Text: Account data is retained as long as your account is active. Chat session metadata is retained for 90 days for moderation purposes. Report data is retained for 1 year. You may request full deletion at any time.
legal.privacyS9Text: Synapse is intended for users aged 18 and older. We do not knowingly collect data from individuals under 18. If we discover that a user is under 18, their account will be terminated immediately.
legal.privacyS10Text: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify users of material changes through the platform. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
